description:
GIVEN a game has a mediaFeedType of NATIONAL
AND mediaState does not equal MEDIA_ARCHIVE
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg

**NOTE:**
National TV game = -FOX Saturday Baseball or ESPN Sunday Night Baseball-   ESPN, Netflix, NBC/Peacock Sunday Night Baseball

Seeing doc for specifics : [https://support.mlb.com/s/article/MLB-TV-Game-Availability?language=en_US|https://support.mlb.com/s/article/MLB-TV-Game-Availability?language=en_US|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN the US based user views the game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a blackout badge is displayed upper left corner of the game tile (blackout for US users)
AND a locked badge is displayed in the left upper left corner of the game tile (locked for underauthenticated users)
